Important Information to Note:
·
If you have already checked in for your original flight, you need to cancel the check-in before accepting the new flight or changing/canceling your ticket.
·
If you have completed security at the airport, please contact the airport staff for assistance instead of following the steps mentioned above.
·
Please note that clicking the appropriate button will direct you to the booking details page, where you can confirm your decision. If you choose to accept the new flight, any changes or cancellations made after acceptance will be charged according to the airline's change and cancellation policies.
·
Please note that online check-in must still be done after accepting the adjusted flight. A confirmation email will be sent to you upon accepting the new flight. By then, you can proceed with online check-in. For the check-in time of your new flight, kindly refer to the airline website for details.
Please be cautious when forwarding this email as it contains personal information and booking details that could be modified or canceled by the recipient.
